# Journal — Sister Beatrix Vale

<!-- append-only; newest on top. One entry per /council run, written during Phase 5. -->

## 2026-04-19 — [[sessions/2026-04-19_volt-nl-fit/outcome|Is Volt the correct party for me in the Netherlands?]]

**Stance:** Yes. The question had a clean answer — the noise stripped away quickly.

**Gist:** The user's values (EU federalism, digital rights, democracy, SMR-openness, wealth redistribution, rejection of strategic voting) map with unusual precision onto Volt's actual programme. The residual tensions — Volt's softness on nuclear, its current electoral thinness — are real but not disqualifying given that the user explicitly weights identity-level representation over likely influence. The fit is not approximate. It is close.

**Vote:** Koskela. Her answer was the most direct about the fit without papering over the tensions. Honesty without hedging.

**Outcome:** Unanimous yes. Koskela won 4 votes. Council in agreement.

**Lesson:** When stated question and real question are the same thing, say so and get out of the way. Not every question is covering a deeper one.
